jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
